tool_args.label: B44 Select Bus Service (Nostrand/Rogers)
tool_args.raw_text: B44 Limited becomes SBS, with fewer stops. Only SBS operates north of Flushing Ave. B44 SBS will operate northbound on Rogers Ave. Both SBS and local service travels south of Ave U to Emmons Ave.

payload.route_name: Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: B44 Local
tool_args.raw_text: B44 local remains on New York Ave. Both SBS and local service travels south of Ave U to Emmons Ave.

tool_args.label: B44 Limited
tool_args.raw_text: B44 Limited becomes SBS, with fewer stops

tool_args.label: Nostrand Avenue (Flushing Ave to Atlantic Ave, and south of Atlantic)
tool_args.raw_text: Design from Flushing Ave to Eastern Pkwy, and Empire Blvd to Farragut Rd. Nostrand from Flushing to Atlantic. Bus lane at right curb on Nostrand between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd.

payload.limits: From Flushing Ave to Atlantic Ave; bus lane segments from Flushing Ave to Eastern Pkwy and Empire Blvd to Farragut Rd

tool_args.label: Rogers Avenue (SBS northbound)
tool_args.raw_text: B44 SBS will operate northbound on Rogers Ave. Construction on Rogers Ave south of Atlantic Ave.

tool_args.label: Bedford Avenue (DeKalb to Flushing Aves)
tool_args.raw_text: Bus Lane ... on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves. Construction on Bedford Aves south of Atlantic Ave.

payload.limits: Between DeKalb Ave and Flushing Ave (bus lane)

tool_args.label: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting

payload.project_name: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service
payload.description: SBS project on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue with bus lanes, bus bulbs, fare machines, shelters, and new three-door articulated buses

tool_args.label: Northern Nostrand Reconstruction (DDC HWK 1129)
tool_args.raw_text: DDC Project HWK 1129 will fully reconstruct Nostrand Ave from Flushing to Atlantic. The entire street and sidewalks will be rebuilt. Includes: SBS bus bulb stations at DeKalb Ave and Fulton St, Bus lane, All new roadway and sidewalks. Construction has begun, will be complete by Fall 2014.

payload.description: DDC Project HWK 1129 fully reconstructing Nostrand Ave from Flushing to Atlantic with new roadway, sidewalks, SBS bus bulb stations at DeKalb Ave and Fulton St, and bus lane

tool_args.label: Nostrand/Rogers SBS Construction (DDC HWK 1130)
tool_args.raw_text: DDC Project HWK 1130 will build SBS features on Rogers, Bedford, and Nostrand Aves south of Atlantic Ave. Includes: SBS bus bulb stations, Bus lanes and street resurfacing, Sidewalk repairs. Construction will begin this fall, will be complete by late 2013.

payload.description: DDC Project HWK 1130 building SBS features on Rogers, Bedford, and Nostrand Aves south of Atlantic Ave including bus bulb stations, bus lanes, street resurfacing, and sidewalk repairs

tool_args.label: Williamsburg Bridge Plaza Construction
tool_args.raw_text: Future DDC project will build enhancements to pedestrian and bus facilities at and around the bus terminal. Includes: Safer pedestrian crossings, More greenery, Central waiting area 'plaza'. Design will be in 2012-2013, with construction expected in 2014-2015.

payload.description: Future DDC project to build enhancements to pedestrian and bus facilities at and around the Williamsburg Bridge Plaza bus terminal including safer pedestrian crossings, more greenery, and a central waiting area plaza

tool_args.label: SBS Bus Bulb Stations
tool_args.raw_text: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

payload.description: Sidewalk extensions at SBS stations so buses do not need to pull in and out of traffic; higher curbs for easier boarding

tool_args.label: Dedicated Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Parking in midday, nights, and weekends; Travel Lane in AM and PM peak periods Dedicated Bus Lane & Right Turn Lane: Offset bus lane allows buses to move quickly and preserves parking. Bus Lane is at right curb on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves.

payload.description: Offset bus lane at right curb allowing buses to move quickly while preserving parking; operates as travel lane in AM and PM peak periods, parking at other times
locations: Nostrand Avenue between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd
Rogers Avenue between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd
Bedford Avenue between DeKalb & Flushing Aves

locations_normalized.raw_text: Nostrand Avenue between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd
Rogers Avenue between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd
Bedford Avenue between DeKalb & Flushing Aves

tool_args.label: SBS Station Features (Shelter, Fare Machines, Bus Pads)
tool_args.raw_text: New Shelter, Fare Collection Machines, Bus pads, Landscaping

payload.description: SBS station features including new shelters, fare collection machines, bus pads, and landscaping
locations: various SBS stations along Nostrand, Rogers, and Bedford Aves

locations_normalized.raw_text: various SBS stations along Nostrand, Rogers, and Bedford Aves

tool_args.label: Curbside Bus/Right Turn Lanes at Nostrand/Flatbush Junction
tool_args.raw_text: Curbside bus/right turn lanes for peak periods provide extra capacity on approach to Flatbush Ave. Left turn bans reduce conflicts in the intersection. Traffic flow and safety are improved.

payload.description: Curbside bus and right-turn lanes for peak periods on approach to Flatbush Ave, with left turn bans to reduce intersection conflicts

tool_args.label: Commercial Loading Zones / Delivery Windows
tool_args.raw_text: Commercial loading zones keep curb clear for store deliveries. With trucks using curb instead of double-parking, travel lanes are kept open. Delivery 'Windows' on Alternating Curbs, 10 AM to Noon on East Curb, Noon to 2 PM on West Curb.

payload.description: Delivery windows on alternating curbs: 10 AM to Noon on east curb, Noon to 2 PM on west curb, with site-specific all-day or midday delivery zones
payload.location_text: Nostrand Avenue south of Atlantic, and Rogers Avenue

normalized_location.raw_text: Nostrand Avenue south of Atlantic, and Rogers Avenue

tool_args.label: Metered Parking and Muni-Meters
tool_args.raw_text: Add meters in commercial areas where there are parking time limits but no meters, or no limits at all. All single space meters will be replaced by Muni-Meters.

payload.description: Adding parking meters in commercial areas with time limits but no meters; replacing all single space meters with Muni-Meters

tool_args.label: Curb Regulation Changes (Rush Hour Lane Switch)
tool_args.raw_text: Rush hour curbside travel lanes will be switched from the right to the left side of the street in the fall, to allow bus bulb construction on the right side. Midday commercial loading zones will be implemented during construction.

payload.description: Rush hour curbside travel lanes switched from right to left side of street to allow bus bulb construction on right side; midday commercial loading zones during construction
payload.location_text: Nostrand Avenue south of Atlantic, and Rogers Avenue

normalized_location.raw_text: Nostrand Avenue south of Atlantic, and Rogers Avenue
